infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: GoFarther AI needs speech recognition to understand your voice commands.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GoFarther AI needs microphone access for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: GoFarther AI needs contacts access to find and call people.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: GoFarther AI needs calendar access to create and view events.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GoFarther AI uses the camera for document scanning.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GoFarther AI needs location for directions and nearby search.
